evaluation.source: local-only crop from a public reader screenshot
evaluation.runtime: MindSpore Lite CPU using the release artifact and the Reader 160 px tile plus 10 px prepadding contract

decision: Accept for publication. The artifact produced a coherent full image without tile seams or padding artifacts and visibly restored sharper line and eye detail than the 2x Lanczos baseline. Evaluation input and output remain local-only.
